# agentlens-sdk (Python)

> Python SDK for AgentLens — real-time observability for AI agents.

## Install

```bash
pip install agentlens-sdk
pip install "agentlens-sdk[openai]"       # includes openai
pip install "agentlens-sdk[anthropic]"    # includes anthropic
pip install "agentlens-sdk[langchain]"    # includes langchain-core
pip install "agentlens-sdk[all]"          # all extras
```

## Public API

```python
from agentlens_sdk import (
    init,               # connect to AgentLens server
    trace,              # @trace decorator
    auto_instrument,    # patch OpenAI + Anthropic automatically
    get_tracer,         # returns the active Tracer instance
    shutdown,           # flush and disconnect
)
```

## Usage Patterns

### Auto-instrument (recommended — zero code changes)

```python
from agentlens_sdk import auto_instrument
auto_instrument()
# All OpenAI and Anthropic calls are now traced automatically
```

### @trace decorator

```python
from agentlens_sdk import init, trace

init(server_url="ws://localhost:8766/ws", session_name="my-agent")

@trace(name="research_step")
async def research(query: str) -> str:
    return await call_llm(query)
```

### Manual spans

```python
from agentlens_sdk import get_tracer

async with get_tracer().span("tool_call", event_type="tool_call") as span:
    span.set_input({"query": query})
    result = await run_tool(query)
    span.set_output(result)
```

### LangChain

```python
from agentlens_sdk.interceptors.langchain_interceptor import AgentLensCallbackHandler
chain = my_chain.with_config(callbacks=[AgentLensCallbackHandler()])
```

### Semantic Kernel

```python
from agentlens_sdk.interceptors.semantic_kernel_interceptor import instrument_semantic_kernel
instrument_semantic_kernel(kernel)
```

## init() Options

```python
init(
    server_url="ws://localhost:8766/ws",  # WebSocket URL (default)
    http_url="http://localhost:8766",     # HTTP URL for batch ingest
    session_name="my-agent-v2",          # shown in dashboard
    agent_name="researcher",             # agent identifier
    session_id="01JKXXX...",             # override auto-generated ULID
)
```

## Design Guarantees

- **Never raises** — all SDK calls are wrapped in try/except. Your agent always runs.
- **Non-blocking** — async batched sends, <5ms overhead per call.
- **Auto-redaction** — fields named `api_key`, `token`, `password`, `secret`, `authorization` are replaced with `[REDACTED]` before transmission.
- **Graceful degradation** — if server is unreachable, events are silently dropped.
- **Auto session** — ULID session ID created on first event if not provided.

## Key Source Files

- [src/agentlens_sdk/__init__.py](src/agentlens_sdk/__init__.py) — public API surface
- [src/agentlens_sdk/trace.py](src/agentlens_sdk/trace.py) — `@trace` decorator, `SpanContext`, `Tracer`
- [src/agentlens_sdk/client.py](src/agentlens_sdk/client.py) — WebSocket client, batch queue, reconnect logic
- [src/agentlens_sdk/config.py](src/agentlens_sdk/config.py) — `AgentLensConfig` dataclass
- [src/agentlens_sdk/interceptors/openai_interceptor.py](src/agentlens_sdk/interceptors/openai_interceptor.py)
- [src/agentlens_sdk/interceptors/anthropic_interceptor.py](src/agentlens_sdk/interceptors/anthropic_interceptor.py)
- [src/agentlens_sdk/interceptors/langchain_interceptor.py](src/agentlens_sdk/interceptors/langchain_interceptor.py)
- [src/agentlens_sdk/interceptors/crewai_interceptor.py](src/agentlens_sdk/interceptors/crewai_interceptor.py)
- [src/agentlens_sdk/interceptors/autogen_interceptor.py](src/agentlens_sdk/interceptors/autogen_interceptor.py)
- [src/agentlens_sdk/interceptors/semantic_kernel_interceptor.py](src/agentlens_sdk/interceptors/semantic_kernel_interceptor.py)

## Trace Event Fields Sent to Server

```python
{
    "session_id": str,          # ULID
    "event_type": str,          # llm_call | tool_call | decision | memory_read | memory_write | user_input | error
    "event_name": str,          # human label for this step
    "timestamp": str,           # ISO 8601 UTC
    "duration_ms": float,
    "model": str | None,        # e.g. "gpt-4o-mini"
    "tokens_input": int,
    "tokens_output": int,
    "cost_usd": float | None,   # auto-calculated server-side if omitted
    "input_data": any,          # serialized to JSON
    "output_data": any,
    "status": "success" | "error",
    "error_message": str | None,
    "parent_event_id": str | None,  # ULID of parent span
    "metadata": dict | None,
}
```

## PyPI

`agentlens-sdk` — https://pypi.org/project/agentlens-sdk/
